clinical_message.headline: Immediate clinical review recommended
clinical_message.summary: Predicted deterioration risk is high (1.00). Escalate bedside assessment and review within the next 12 hours.
actions: Review airway, breathing, and circulation immediately.
Repeat full vital signs and confirm SpO2 trend.
Review lactate, creatinine, and blood pressure urgently.
Notify the responsible ICU physician if clinically indicated.

note: Exact 24h sequence from dataset was used.
